serialNotInWhitelist: Serial number is not in the allowed list.
activeSession: Cannot delete: an active charging session is in progress. Try again after the session completes.
hasTransactionHistory: Cannot delete a station that has charging history. Stations with completed transactions are preserved to protect payment and settlement records.
invalidSerial: Serial number must contain digits only.
ambiguousSerial: Multiple chargers match this serial number. Please enter the exact serial number.
revoked: This charging station has been suspended.
